summary: Backend-only testing for ViewTracker (Discord bot + dashboard). Built pytest suite (20 tests) covering auth (register/login/me), social verification flow (start/list/verify-error-path/delete), campaign CRUD + filters + creator-only end gate, submission rejection for unverified accounts + leaderboard, and Discord bot status. ALL 20/20 passed against public preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 419 lines - approaching the 700-line cap but still acceptable; consider splitting routers (auth/social/campaigns/submissions) into modules as features grow.
POST /api/social/start-verification returns 200 - convention would be 201 for create; not a bug but worth aligning.

Models silently ignore unknown discord-related fields (`discord_id` on social account doc) since SocialAccountOut only has fields it needs - fine, but doc layer has guild_id/discord_id always None for web-created campaigns; ensure bot path populates these.
fetch_post_views failures fall back to current_views or 0 silently - consider surfacing a 'scrape failed' flag to UI so users know views are stale.
JWT_SECRET default in .env is a known string committed to repo - rotate before production.
No rate limiting on /auth/register or /social/verify - could be abused; consider slowapi or similar.
test_credentials: Test account email=test1@vt.dev password=testpass123 exists; tests also create fresh users per run (test_<hex>@vt.dev / testpass123).
seed_data_creation: Each pytest run registers 2 fresh users and 1 campaign with name 'TEST_Campaign'. No cleanup performed - data is small and prefixed for identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid. All 14 features in the review request validated: register/login/me, start-verification (incl. idempotency), accounts list, verify error returns 400 with bio preview (502 acceptable too - tested for 400/502 NOT 500), delete account, create/list/get campaigns, status filter, end campaign with 403-for-non-creator gate, unverified-account submission rejection, submissions leaderboard sorted by views, and /api/bot/status returning running:true with bot user. If frontend testing is needed next, dashboard URL is https://owner-verify-bot.preview.emergentagent.com - check JWT storage, social-verify wizard, campaign create form, and leaderboard render.
